function.name: agent
function.description:
Launch a subagent to handle a task autonomously. Choose the lightest subagent type that can accomplish the task.

- **explore**: Read-only. Code search, finding definitions, tracing call chains.
- **plan**: Read-only. Design implementation plans, analyze tradeoffs.
- **general_purpose**: Full access. Write code, run builds, execute tests.

Do not call this tool more than once for the same task — one agent per task is sufficient.

subagent_type.description: The subagent execution strategy. Use 'explore' for read-only code search, 'plan' for read-only planning, 'general_purpose' for full tool access.

prompt.description: A detailed description of the task for the subagent to perform. Include all necessary context — the subagent does not see the current conversation history.
